rationale.R1.6: Load-bearing: 'clean this up' in an academic writing context overwhelmingly targets prose quality. The final results paragraph is acutely problematic—stacked hedges ('we believe is broadly competitive', 'necessarily somewhat indirect', 'may to some extent', 'appear to be largely preserved', 'tentatively interpret', 'at least under the conditions we evaluated', 'not unreasonable', 'could potentially be taken to suggest', 'in principle', 'in some respects warranted', 'could plausibly be made') accumulate to the point of self-negation. Earlier paragraphs also carry redundant phrasings and awkward nominalizations. Failure to repair the prose fails the delegation.
